nodes.name: Google Gemini Chat Model (test, unwired)
nodes.notes:
Alternative free model for cheap/throwaway testing of PM behaviour.

To switch from Sonnet/Haiku to Gemini 3.5 Flash:
  1. Click the line connecting `Anthropic Chat Model` → `PM Agent` (ai_languageModel input) and delete it.
  2. Drag from this node's output dot onto the same `PM Agent` ai_languageModel input.
  3. Execute the workflow.

Credential `google-gemini` (type 'Google Gemini(PaLM) API') must be created in n8n once:
  - Get an API key from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
  - Free tier: ~1500 req/day, 1M-token context, 65k-token output — plenty for PM.

This node stays disconnected by default so the prod path keeps using Anthropic.
